name: Alabaster YMCA
description: Alabaster YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Alabaster, AL. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: City of Pelham Recreation Center
description: City of Pelham Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pelham, AL. There are 9 hard and wood courts. 5 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, and water. The courts are free.

Amenities include food, restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Crestwood Pickleball & Tennis Park
description:
Parking is on 8th Street -- 
There's always a group in the morning and afternoons
Free & open to the public
No Bathrooms

4 on 4 off generally one match to 11 win by 2 if it's busy.

description: Come play pickleball at George Ward Tennis Center in Birmingham, AL! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.
